Class RutinaDTO

Namespace
BLL.DTOs
Assembly
BLL.dll

Projection of a Rutina (training routine) entity with its associated exercises.

public class RutinaDTO
Inheritance
object
RutinaDTO
Inherited Members
object.ToString()
object.Equals(object)
object.Equals(object, object)
object.ReferenceEquals(object, object)
object.GetHashCode()
object.GetType()
object.MemberwiseClone()

Remarks

An active routine is identified by a null Hasta value. Only one routine per client may be active at a time; creating a new one via RutinaService.CrearRutina automatically finalizes the previous active routine. Ejercicios is initialized to an empty list on construction.

Constructors

RutinaDTO() 

public RutinaDTO()

Properties

ClienteID

FK to the client this routine belongs to.

public Guid ClienteID { get; set; }

Property Value

Guid

ClienteNombre

Full name of the client, hydrated by the service layer.

public string ClienteNombre { get; set; }

Property Value

string

Desde

Date the routine became active.

public DateTime Desde { get; set; }

Property Value

DateTime

Detalle

Optional notes or description for the routine.

public string Detalle { get; set; }

Property Value

string

Ejercicios

Ordered list of exercises belonging to this routine.

public List<EjercicioDTO> Ejercicios { get; set; }

Property Value

List<EjercicioDTO>

Hasta

Date the routine was finalized, or null if still active.

public DateTime? Hasta { get; set; }

Property Value

DateTime?

Id

Primary key, auto-assigned on construction.

public Guid Id { get; set; }

Property Value

Guid
